name: Helen's Baked Beans in Tomato Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans overnight.
2. Cook the soaked beans until tender.
3. Chop the vegetables: bacon, onions, pepper, and celery.
4. Simmer the chopped vegetables together but do not brown them.
5. Place all ingredients in a casserole or bean crock.
6. Bake at 300°F for 2-7 hours until done.
(Note: Helen Peagram)
